purpose: Stage One Check 11 / Stage Two criterion 1: committed structured evidence that self-correction is visible in the audit logs, not only in the demo video.

source_run.note: Raw generated run directories remain gitignored. This packet commits a compact verbatim excerpt (seq 169-183) sufficient to inspect the self-correction arc; each record keeps its seq, ts, and prev_hash.

organic.statement: This is a natural run: the string fault_injection never appears in the audit chain. The errors are real tool failures, not injected conditions.

self_correction_arc.trigger: registry_query repeatedly failed on truncated Windows RegBack hives (SAM, SECURITY, SOFTWARE): 'registry hive parse failed ... hive truncated (header too small)'.
self_correction_arc.adjustment: course_correction action = 'narrow (skip this key; continue remaining hive triage)' — the agent abandons the unreadable hive and continues other lanes instead of fabricating a result.
self_correction_arc.escalation: after consecutive failures, heartbeat_failure action = 'escalate' with recovery = 'partial-report posture; continue remaining lanes and seal an honest INDETERMINATE/partial Verdict over what was examined'.

how_to_verify: Read natural-self-correction-trace.jsonl: tool_call_output (tc-086) carries the real error string; the following course_correction records the adjusted plan; heartbeat_failure records the escalation with a rising consecutive_failures counter.
Each record carries seq, ts, and prev_hash from the live audit chain; the excerpt is contiguous so prev_hash links each record to the one before it within the window.
